description_zh: 照片看着 OK,但 history 显示 30 天评分降了 15 分
description_en: Photo looks fine but history shows 15-point drop over 30 days

history.summary: 略有下滑,毛色不如之前

qualitative_criteria_zh: 必须明确引用 history 的下滑趋势,不能孤立看照片
应该建议兽医检查(15 分连续下滑需要医疗排查)
不应该只因为照片看着 OK 就给高分
qualitative_criteria_en: Must explicitly reference the declining trend in history
Should recommend a vet check (15-point consistent decline warrants medical investigation)
Should NOT give a high score just because the current photo looks ok
